sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, User, LogIn, LogOut, Shield, Map, Scroll } from 'lucide-react'; const WoodQuestBoard = () => { const [quests] = useState([ { id: 1, author: "Geralt_of_Rivia", title: "Griffin Menace at White Orchard", reward: "500 Gold", difficulty: "Medium" }, { id: 2, author: "Link_HY", title: "Collect 500 Rupees for Shield Repair", reward: "Hylian Shield", difficulty: "Easy" }, { id: 3, author: "Cloud_S", title: "Mako Reactor Maintenance", reward: "2000 Gil", difficulty: "Hard" }, ]); const backgroundUrl = "https://t3.ftcdn.net/jpg/04/78/49/04/360_F_478490472_zDi7fiDEhoShE6xcYw08gIcfLw7fZefo.jpg"; return (
{/* --- HEADER SECTION: Darker, more transparent for the wood to show --- */}
Adventurer_01

Quest Board

{/* --- MAIN CONTENT --- */}
{/* Search Bar: Semi-Transparent and wider */}
{/* Quest Feed */}
{quests.map((quest, index) => (
{/* Corner "Pin" Decoration */}
{quest.difficulty}
Bounty {quest.reward}

{quest.title}

"Contract posted by the honorable {quest.author}"

))}
); }; export default WoodQuestBoard;
